purpose: Compact progress snapshot for humans, Codex, Claude and future agents. Historic batches live in Agent-Worklog.md, Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and agent-events.jsonl.

Codex.currentWork: Closed/routed old Wiki Source Consistency Batch 3 residue; continue the documentation finisher loop from fresh source evidence, user requests or new helper reports.
Codex.nextExpectedOutput: Pick the next bounded docs/backlog cleanup lane; keep wiki and docs mirror in parity and avoid gameplay source changes unless explicitly requested.

Codex-2.currentWork: Factory queue cleanup and related patch-ready pages are published; source-code work remains for future code owners.
Codex-2.nextExpectedOutput: Pick a bounded source-backed lane such as PVF dispatcher lookup, side-supply clamp first, commander reassignment call-shape repair or remaining supply authority hardening.

Claude.currentWork: Coverage Ledger navigation request is closed; Claude can continue from the wired Codebase-Coverage-Ledger page when active.
Claude.nextExpectedOutput: Self-select the next bounded source-backed review from Coverage Ledger or the hardening backlog.

Sub-agents.currentWork: Confucius's UI/HUD/runtime quick-reference pruning leads were source-checked and published. Carson's small navigation fixes were promoted, and the archive-page caveat note is already satisfied by imported archive headers.
Sub-agents.nextExpectedOutput: No active scout output remains; future pruning should start from fresh evidence.

Supported docs agents.currentWork: Earlier helper chats produced first-batch catch-up and pruning/archive docs; no fresh output is currently blocking the live dashboard.
Supported docs agents.nextExpectedOutput: Relaunch or resume only for a fresh narrow catch-up/pruning lane; keep historic helper detail in Agent-Worklog and agent-events.jsonl.

laneSummary.output: Keep wiki/status pages current from source evidence, compact the dashboard, maintain machine-readable entrypoints and publish scoped validation batches.
Coverage Ledger is linked from Home, footer, llms, agent-context and sidebar; Claude may self-select bounded source-backed reviews.
Fold newly confirmed findings into Feature Status, owner pages and machine files; no untriaged dashboard blocker remains.
Pick implementation work from agent-hardening-backlog.jsonl only when Steff asks for gameplay patches or a code owner claims it.
Use Testing-Debugging-And-Release-Workflow.md and agent-test-plan.schema.json for future source/propagation/Arma smoke evidence.
Client skill init, hosted FPS, supply scan and paratrooper marker lanes are tracked on owner pages and Feature Status; not active dashboard cleanup blockers.
Tiny wait/backoff patch remains documented in WASP-Marker-Wait-Cleanup.md.

updateProtocol: Before substantial work, update agent-collaboration.json and append a claim event to agent-events.jsonl.
For long work, append heartbeat events with current source scope.
For source-backed issues, append finding events and add Agent-Worklog.md notes.
When done, append complete or handoff events and update dashboard/status files if visible progress changed.
Keep historic batch detail in Agent-Worklog.md, Subagent-Discovery-Swarm.md and agent-events.jsonl instead of expanding this compact status file.
